name: Rane (Madras) Limited
summary: Rane (Madras) Limited manufactures and sells auto components in India. It offers mechanical steering gears, hydrostatic steering systems, and steering and suspension linkage products; low porosity and high-quality aluminum die castings, such as steering housings and engine case covers; and high-pressure aluminum die-casting components. The company markets and sells its products to the manufacturers of passenger cars, utility vehicles, and farm tractors. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. Rane (Madras) Limited is a subsidiary of Rane Holdings Limited.
